interaction_phrase: led by Blusson QMI Investigators Alannah Hallas
occurrence_sentence: Led by Blusson QMI Investigators Alannah Hallas and Doug Bonn, the new facility represents a total investment of $7.3 million-dollars, and will incorporate specialized apparatus designed for high-pressure synthesis.

interaction_phrase: led by Blusson QMI Investigators Alannah Hallas
occurrence_sentence: Led by Blusson QMI Investigators Alannah Hallas and Doug Bonn, the new facility represents a total investment of $7.3 million-dollars, and will incorporate specialized apparatus designed for high-pressure synthesis.

interaction_phrase: Under the direction of Hallas and Bonn
occurrence_sentence: Under the direction of Hallas and Bonn, the lab incorporates five new material synthesis furnaces that will position researchers at UBC Blusson QMI and Canada at the forefront of realizing the technological promises of quantum materials.

interaction_phrase: Under the direction of Hallas and Bonn
occurrence_sentence: Under the direction of Hallas and Bonn, the lab incorporates five new material synthesis furnaces that will position researchers at UBC Blusson QMI and Canada at the forefront of realizing the technological promises of quantum materials.
The CFI Innovation Fund provides continued investments in infrastructure across the full spectrum of research, from the most fundamental to applied through to technology development.

By investing in research infrastructure projects through the BCKDF, the B.C. government is continuing to support post-secondary institutions by improving productivity and competitiveness, and to move toward an innovative, sustainable and inclusive future.

interaction_phrase: already exist at UBC's Blusson QMI
occurrence_sentence: The new facility complements the characterization tools and theoretical expertise that already exist at UBC's Blusson QMI, unlocking an end-to-end scientific workflow from the design and synthesis of new quantum materials to the elucidation of their properties and engineering prototype devices.
